features: ♨️500ml & 1 LITRE HOT WATER BOTTLE keeps you warm for long.Fill up your bottle with hot water and keep your self warm, comfortable and relaxed in chilly winter nights. Enjoy your cold Sunday with a cup of coffee while sitting on a couch, watching your favourite movie or TV show. Put it in your bed 5-7 minutes before going to sleep it will soothe you for next 3 to 6 hours.

♨️EXTREMELY EFFECTIVE IN PAIN RELIEF: Whether you are suffering from cramps, stress, aching muscles or menstrual cramps, our hot water bag will give you pain relief. it is ideal for warming your bed and helps ease pain and creates a conducive environment in difficult times.

♨️ ANTI LEAK DESIGN: The 1000ml hot water bottle is made of high-quality natural rubber. It has a wide mouth with plastic screwed stopper preventing any chance of leakage and hence reducing any risk of burns by hot-water bottle. It is designed to retain heat for an extended period so that you do not need to refill it every now and then.

♨️ SAVE £££: Try using our body hot water bottle for keeping you warm rather than warming your room with a heater and paying hundreds of £££ for that. Just fill the hot bottle water with warm water tighten the screw, put it in your bed and stay warm for hours without paying even a single penny.

♨️ OUR PRODUCT can be used as kids hot water bottle and mens hot water bottle It meets SAFETY STANDARDS BS1970-2012: So you can use our 'hot water bottle' with confidence and a sense of security which lets you taste comfort and soothe with ease of use.

IMPORTANT: Complies with BS 1970:2012 (Clause 9 Marking): The embossed mark on the bottle shows the year and week of manufacture for traceability. Natural rubber may gradually deteriorate over time, so it is advisable to replace the bottle after 2–3 years of first use. Please see image on how to read manufacturing date.
description: Product description Our old-fashioned hot water bottle is a remedy for all kind of discomforts like cramps, stress, aching muscles or menstrual cramps, back pain etc. The sloth hot water bottle is available in red, blue and cream colours so you can match it with your couch or bed’s fabric. SIZE AND VOLUME We are presenting 500ml hot water bottles. You can use these mini hot water bottles for kids men, women, boys and girls. Natural rubber is the material used for these bottles that can act as instant hot and cold water bags. MATERIAL These hand hot water bottle are rubber pouches that simply need you to add hot water. They are same in function as a heating pad, with the added advantage that they don't require a power source. MOUTH SIZE The mouth has a diameter of around 2.5 cm that is good enough for the easy and safe pouring of hot water. Trying to fill a hot water bottle with a narrow mouth can be both frustrating and dangerous. TEXTURE Ribbed textures on a hot water bottle help to diffuse heat throughout the surface of the bottle, which provides moderately intense heat. PRECAUTIONS You should always use a towel or other barrier between your skin and your hot water bottle to protect you from burns. Hold the bottle by the neck in an upright position and fill slowly to avoid hot water splashing back. Do not fill the bottle with boiled water instead use warm water. Do not fill the bottle more than two-third as this might cause the bottle to burst. Screw the stopper sufficiently tight to ensure that any leakage should not take place. IMPORTANT Complies with BS 1970:2012 (Clause 9 Marking): The embossed mark on the bottle shows the year and week of manufacture for traceability. Natural rubber may gradually deteriorate over time, so it is advisable to replace the bottle after 2–3 years of first use. Please see image on how to read manufacturing date. Indications pain relief Directions Fill the hot water bottle with hot water, tighten the screw, place it in the bed. See more
